channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Insta360’s last-gen Link 2C is fantastic 4K webcam now that it’s 20 percent off
item.description: If you spend a lot of time presenting or chatting over video, you know how big a difference a decent webcam can make. Thankfully, if you’re looking to level up your setup at home or at work, the last-gen Insta360 Link 2C is currently available for $119.99 ($30 off) at Amazon, Best Buy, and B&H […]

item.title: Smart Glasses Now Have One of the Vision Pro’s Best Features
item.description: They say eyes are windows to the soul. Well, they're also the windows to more windows, too.

item.title: Meta will fund seven new natural gas plants to power its biggest data center yet
item.description: Meta will essentially foot the power bill for the $27 billion mega data center it's building in Louisiana. On Friday, the Wall Street Journal reported that the company struck a deal to fund the energy infrastructure needed for the project.Through a deal with Entergy Louisiana, Meta will fund seven new natural gas power plants, 240 miles of transmission lines and battery energy storage at three locations. The gas plants will have a combined power output of 5,200 megawatts, and the transmission lines will operate at 500 kilovolts.In addition, the company will help fund up to 2,500 MW of new rene...

item.title: Marvel Just Put ‘Daredevil: Born Again’ Season 2 in a Very Weird Place in the MCU Timeline
item.description: This is as far into the future of the MCU as we've seen, with one exception.

item.title: Celebrate the weekend in the perfect way by picking up an 80% discount on your first two months of Paramount Plus Premium
item.description: What better way to welcome in the weekend than a Paramount Plus deal that knocks off up to 80% of your first two months.

item.title: A CyberSUV could be on the way — as Elon Musk claims that Tesla is working on 'something way cooler than a minivan'
item.description: Elon Musk has rumors circulating that the company is working on something new — but the internet is divided.

item.title: Claude is limiting usage more aggressively during peak hours — here’s what changed
item.description: It’s all about managing peak times

item.title: European Commission confirms data breach
item.description: The European Commission has announced that it suffered a cyber attack that affected "cloud infrastructure hosting the Commission's web presence on the Europea.eu platform." While the attack has been contained, Bleeping Computer reports that the threat actor claiming to be behind it was able to take over 350GB of data before the Commission addressed the issue. "Early findings of our ongoing investigation suggest that data have been taken from [Europa] websites," the European Commission says. "The Commission is duly notifying the Union entities who might have been affected by the incident."The C...

item.title: The White House has an app now, and Trump wants you to report people to ICE on it
item.description: A new official White House app on Android and iOS takes the content from the White House website and copies it into app format. A tweet announcing the app on Friday morning appeared alongside a video joking about missile launches that also appears to feature an iPhone, rather than the elusive Trump Phone. There's no […]

item.title: Trump Drops $1B to Kill 2 Wind Farms, Then Watches a Bigger One Go Online
item.description: A first-of-its-kind deal killed two offshore wind projects and reinvested the funds in fossil fuels. The next day, the nation’s largest offshore wind farm started delivering power.

item.title: One penguin that isn't suitable for kids? Linux will now carry out age verification checks
item.description: Recent systemd updates store user birth dates for age verification, causing debate across Linux distros over legal compliance and privacy concerns.

item.title: Iranian Hackers Breached Kash Patel’s Email—but Not the FBI’s
item.description: Plus: Apple makes big claims about the effectiveness of its Lockdown Mode anti-spyware feature, Russia moves to implement homegrown encryption for 5G, and more.

item.title: Wait, the Trump phone might actually exist
item.description: Where's the Trump phone? We're going to keep talking about it every week. We've reached out, as usual, to ask about the Trump phone's whereabouts. This week I think I've found an FCC listing for the phone, showing it's received certification to launch in the US. Last week I issued a reminder that Trump Mobile's […]

item.title: Scientists Found a Weird New Way to Wash Fruits and Vegetables
item.description: Coupled with low-frequency sound waves, bubbles "slide" back and forth against dirt to make surfaces squeaky clean.

item.title: White House’s Mysterious ‘Covfefe Moment’ Was Stupider Than We Imagined
item.description: Government of trolls.

item.title: Memory chip giant SK hynix could help end ‘RAMmageddon’ with blockbuster US IPO
item.description: SK hynix’s potential U.S. listing could raise $10-$14 billion to help it build more capacity, encourage others to follow, and end the 'RAMmageddon' memory shortage.

item.title: Waymo’s skyrocketing ridership in one chart
item.description: Waymo's weekly paid robotaxi trips have increased tenfold in less than two years.

item.title: Gym Bros Are Pushing Mystery Muscle Drugs Doctors Barely Recognize, Study Warns
item.description: A new survey of 375 sports medicine experts has uncovered that some of the most popular and sketchiest products aren't even on the radar.

item.title: Avec Artemis II, la Nasa va tester ses astronautes face à l’un des pires dangers de l’espace
item.description: Lors de la mission Artemis II, les astronautes voyageront autour de la Lune à bord du vaisseau Orion, bien au-delà du bouclier magnétique de la Terre. Pour les protéger des tempêtes solaires potentiellement dangereuses, la Nasa surveillera en continu l’activité du Soleil grâce à une flotte de...

item.title: The Head of HBO Explains What it Takes to Get a ‘Game of Thrones’ Spinoff Going
item.description: Don't expect another Westeros show to rush into production, even after the success of 'A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms' and 'House of the Dragon.'

item.title: I thought the Lego smart brick was the worst idea ever — but I just built my first set with it and now I’m in love
item.description: I didn't think I'd like the smart brick, but I absolutely adore it.
